subject: [PATCH 01/24] filelock: add support for ignoring deleg breaks for dir change events

2026-04-07.patch_summary: This patch adds support to ignore delegation breaks for directory change events in the Linux kernel's filelock subsystem. It introduces a new flags parameter to try_break_deleg() and modifies __break_lease to ignore certain types of delegation break events, such as directory creation, deletion, or renaming. This allows NFS clients to be notified of directory changes after the fact instead of having their delegations recalled immediately. The patch also includes several code modifications to implement this new behavior.
